method: Queried live Greenhouse/Ashby/Lever current-openings APIs across ~70 sponsor boards + tight People/L&D/OD filter + US + non-senior + dedup. Only returns roles that exist right now.

verified_live_candidates.verdict: SKIP — JD asks 8+ yr incl 5+ as HRBP (way past ~5yr cap); Figma sponsors but YOE is the blocker
BUILT but WARM-INTRO-ONLY — perfect P1b scope (employee onboarding, her sweet spot) BUT 7+ yr ask + not confirmed sponsor. Package ready if a warm intro materializes; do not bulk-submit.
HARD SKIP — 8+ yr AND explicit "unable to sponsor an employment visa" (true hard blocker)
SKIP — only Compensation BP / Executive BP live = wrong function
not built — Asana prior-skipped + People Partner likely senior; deprioritized

net: Live-API discovery is HONEST (no stale URLs) but confirms at-level + sponsoring + no-account People roles are scarce right now. The cap discipline held: agents SKIPd 8yr roles rather than fabricate tenure. Goalbook remains the 1 submit-ready find; Baseten is a strong-scope warm-intro hold.
pipeline_win: Replaced training-data discovery (90% stale last round) with live board-API queries (0% stale). Worth baking into the discovery step.
